name: Umbra — private payments on Stellar
description: A privacy wallet for Stellar. Balances and amounts stay in shadow — proofs are generated on your device.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://umbra-wallet.vercel.app https://soroban-testnet.stellar.org https://api.coingecko.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:
